fields.committee: AI governance board: CDO (chair), Head of Claims, CISO, DPO, SIU lead, works-council observer. Meets monthly; approves every model go-live and material change.
fields.usagePolicy: Pre-approved: decision support with human override. Board review: any auto-action affecting a customer. Prohibited: fully automated claim denial; use of protected attributes as features.
fields.lifecycle: Models registered centrally; champion/challenger promotion needs board sign-off; drift beyond threshold triggers review; retirement plan mandatory at approval time.
fields.hitl: Adjuster decides every claim outcome; SIU investigator confirms every fraud referral before customer impact; overrides feed monthly model review.
